source.section: 2.1 - Air-to-Air Modes > 2.1.7 - ACM (Air Combat Maneuvering) Modes > 2.1.7.3 - VACQ (Vertical Acquisition)

steps.action: Making sure HMD (Helmet-Mounted Display) is OFF
Pressing the Sensor Control Switch forward to enter ACM mode (selects BST by default)
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch forward to enter ACM — defaults to BST.

steps.action: Pressing the Sensor Control Switch aft to transfer ACM mode from BST to VACQ
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch aft to transfer from BST to VACQ.

steps.action: Radar will automatically attempt to lock on the nearest target To exit ACM mode, press Undesignate Button.
steps.voiced: Radar auto-acquires the nearest target — press Undesignate Button to exit ACM.
